title: Umami Mushroom Banchan
description: A simple, savory side dish featuring sautéed mushrooms and umami flavor. Inspired by Korean cuisine, this banchan is perfect for accompanying steaming bowls of rice or noodles.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of sesame oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the chopped green onions and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the ovoli, intensely, and Korean chili flakes. Stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the flavors have melded together.
Season with soy sauce to taste.
